Class SlmpTargetParser

Namespace
PlcComm.Slmp
Assembly
PlcComm.Slmp.dll

Utility for parsing target station descriptions into SlmpNamedTarget.

ParseAutoNumber(string)

Parses a number string, supporting both decimal and "0x" hexadecimal notation.

public static int ParseAutoNumber(string text)

Parameters

text string

Returns

int

ParseMany(IReadOnlyList<string>)

Parses a list of target strings.

public static IReadOnlyList<SlmpNamedTarget> ParseMany(IReadOnlyList<string> values)

Parameters

values IReadOnlyList<string>

Returns

IReadOnlyList<SlmpNamedTarget>

ParseNamed(string)

Parses a single target string. Supports "SELF", "SELF-CPU1..4", "NWx-STy", or "NAME,NETWORK,STATION,MODULE_IO,MULTIDROP".

public static SlmpNamedTarget ParseNamed(string text)

Parameters

text string

Returns

SlmpNamedTarget
